languages.text: "Потому что вы идете убивать Погонщицу. Если справитесь, ее смерть станет подарком всему полку. Если помрете, но благодаря моим советам сумеете ее подранить, у нас потом будет шанс ее добить".

"Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."
languages.original_text: "Потому что вы идете убивать Погонщицу. Если справитесь, ее смерть станет подарком всему полку. Если помрете, но благодаря моим советам сумеете ее подранить, у нас потом будет шанс ее добить".

traits.locale_text: "Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you croak, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

"Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

"It's not about liking or disliking you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's about what comes after. We're penal soldiers, officially speaking. When our existence becomes known, Merov's brother generals will demand our return, or some vicious Commissar will decide to execute us for desertion — it's been centuries since any of us reported in, after all. Or the Adeptus Administratum will sign an authorisation, and we'll be sent to the front lines to be slaughtered and die. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, are the harbinger of our doom." {n}Having finished, the colonel gives you a look full of bitterness and weariness. You can see that all his thoughts are occupied by the future of the regiment — and none of them are pleasant.{/n}

"It's not about liking or disliking you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's about what comes after. We're penal soldiers, officially speaking. When our existence becomes known, Merov's Brother-Generals will demand our return, or some vicious Commissar will decide to execute us for desertion — it's been centuries since any of us reported in, after all. Or the Adeptus Administratum will sign an authorisation, and we'll be sent to the front lines to be slaughtered and die. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, are the harbinger of our doom." {n}Having finished, the colonel gives you a look full of bitterness and weariness.{/n}

"Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you croak, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

"Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

"Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

languages.text: 「あなたの好き嫌いの話ではありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}。問題はその先です。公式には、我々は懲罰兵です。我々の存在が知れれば、メロフの同僚たる将軍どもが身柄の返還を要求してくるでしょうし、どこかの悪辣なコミッサールが脱走の罪で我々を処刑すると決めるかもしれない——なにしろ我々の誰一人として、もう何世紀も報告を上げていないのですから。あるいはアデプトゥス・アドミニストラトゥムが許可書に署名し、我々は最前線へと送り込まれて皆殺しにされる。あなたこそが、{mf|閣下|閣下}、我々の破滅の前触れなのです」{n}言い終えると、大佐は苦渋と疲労を湛えた目であなたを見る。彼の思考は連隊の行く末で占められており、どれ一つとして心地よいものではない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "It's not about liking or disliking you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. It's about what comes after. We're penal soldiers, officially speaking. When our existence becomes known, Merov's brother generals will demand our return, or some vicious Commissar will decide to execute us for desertion — it's been centuries since any of us reported in, after all. Or the Adeptus Administratum will sign an authorisation, and we'll be sent to the front lines to be slaughtered and die. You, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, are the harbinger of our doom." {n}Having finished, the colonel gives you a look full of bitterness and weariness. You can see that all his thoughts are occupied by the future of the regiment — and none of them are pleasant.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの好き嫌いの話ではありません、{mf|閣下|閣下}。問題はその先です。公式には、我々は懲罰兵です。我々の存在が知れれば、メロフの同僚たる将軍どもが身柄の返還を要求してくるでしょうし、どこかの悪辣なコミッサールが脱走の罪で我々を処刑すると決めるかもしれない——なにしろ我々の誰一人として、もう何世紀も報告を上げていないのですから。あるいはアデプトゥス・アドミニストラトゥムが許可書に署名し、我々は最前線へと送り込まれて皆殺しにされる。あなたこそが、{mf|閣下|閣下}、我々の破滅の前触れなのです。」{n}言い終えると、大佐は苦渋と疲労を湛えた目であなたを見る。彼の思考は連隊の行く末で占められており、どれ一つとして心地よいものではない。{/n}

languages.text: « Parce que vous allez tenter de tuer le Chasseur. Si vous réussissez, sa mort profitera à l'ensemble du régiment. Et si vous mourez, mais que mes conseils vous permettent de le blesser, nous aurons au moins une chance de l'achever la prochaine fois. »
languages.original_text: "Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

traits.locale_text: « Parce que vous allez tenter de tuer le Chasseur. Si vous réussissez, sa mort profitera à l'ensemble du régiment. Et si vous mourez, mais que mes conseils vous permettent de le blesser, nous aurons au moins une chance de l'achever la prochaine fois. »

languages.text: "Çünkü dışarı çıkıp Çoban'ı öldüreceksiniz. Başarırsanız ölümü tüm alaya hediye olur. Ölürseniz ve tavsiyem sonucu onu yaralayabilirseniz en azından daha sonra işini bitirme şansımız olur."
languages.original_text: "Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

traits.locale_text: "Çünkü dışarı çıkıp Çoban'ı öldüreceksiniz. Başarırsanız ölümü tüm alaya hediye olur. Ölürseniz ve tavsiyem sonucu onu yaralayabilirseniz en azından daha sonra işini bitirme şansımız olur."

languages.text: «Porque pretende salir ahí fuera para matar al Pastor. Si lo logra, su muerte será una bendición para todo el regimiento. Y si muere en el intento, pero antes consigue herirlo gracias a mis consejos, quizá luego tengamos más posibilidades de rematarlo».
languages.original_text: "Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

traits.locale_text: «Porque pretende salir ahí fuera para matar al Pastor. Si lo logra, su muerte será una bendición para todo el regimiento. Y si muere en el intento, pero antes consigue herirlo gracias a mis consejos, quizá luego tengamos más posibilidades de rematarlo».

languages.text: “因为您要出去杀拒生花。如果您成功了，它的死就是给整个军团的一份大礼。就算您死了，我提供的建议也能让您先伤到它，那我们日后至少还有机会把它彻底解决。”
languages.original_text: "Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

traits.locale_text: “因为您要出去杀拒生花。如果您成功了，它的死就是给整个军团的一份大礼。就算您死了，我提供的建议也能让您先伤到它，那我们日后至少还有机会把它彻底解决。”

languages.text: "Weil Ihr da rausgeht, um den Treiber zu töten. Sollte Euch das gelingen, wäre sein Tod ein Geschenk für das gesamte Regiment. Falls Ihr sterbt, nachdem Ihr ihn dank meines Rates verwundet habt, haben wir wenigstens die Chance, ihm später den Rest zu geben."
languages.original_text: "Because you're going out there to kill the Drover. If you pull it off, its death will be a gift to the entire regiment. If you die, but my advice helps you wound it first, then at least we'll have a chance to finish it off later."

traits.locale_text: "Weil Ihr da rausgeht, um den Treiber zu töten. Sollte Euch das gelingen, wäre sein Tod ein Geschenk für das gesamte Regiment. Falls Ihr sterbt, nachdem Ihr ihn dank meines Rates verwundet habt, haben wir wenigstens die Chance, ihm später den Rest zu geben."
